name: Monasterio de Vallbona de les Monges y del Tallat — Circular por la ruta del Cister GR-175
region_intro: Mountain biking around Vallbona De Les Monges offers a diverse landscape characterized by rolling hills, agricultural plains, and historical sites. The region features a network of trails that traverse through olive groves, vineyards, and occasional forested areas. Riders can expect varied terrain, from smoother paths suitable for leisure rides to more challenging ascents and descents. The area provides a blend of natural beauty and cultural landmarks, making it suitable for exploring on two wheels. Best mountain bike trails around Vallbona De Les Monges The most popular mountain bike trail is Monasterio de Vallbona de les Monges y del Tallat — Circular por la ruta del Cister GR-175, a 19.7 miles (31.7 km) trail that takes 2 hours 55 minutes to complete. This moderate route explores historical Cistercian sites and offers scenic views of the surrounding countryside. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Coll de Coloma Pass – Old Bridge of Montblanc loop from Vallbona de les Monges, a difficult 67.7 miles (109.0 km) path. This challenging route includes significant elevation changes and passes through varied landscapes, including a historic bridge. Local mountain bikers also love the Mountainbike loop from Maldà, a 25.9 miles (41.7 km) trail leading through agricultural lands and small villages, often completed in about 4 hours 5 minutes. Mountain biking around Vallbona De Les Monges is defined by rolling hills, agricultural landscapes, and historical routes. The network offers options for easy family rides as well as more challenging routes for experienced riders. The routes in Vallbona De Les Monges are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.9 stars from over 50 reviews. More than 1,300 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Vallbona De Les Monges's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available in Vallbona De Les Monges?
A: There are over 100 mountain bike trails around Vallbona De Les Monges, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels. You'll find 10 easy, 74 moderate, and 35 difficult routes to explore.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners or families?
A: Yes, Vallbona De Les Monges offers 10 easy mountain bike trails. A good option for a less strenuous ride is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31529828" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mountainbike loop from Rocallaura&lt;/a&gt;, which is about 9.5 km long and takes around 1 hour 9 minutes to complete.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on mountain bike trails in Vallbona De Les Monges?
A: The terrain around Vallbona De Les Monges is characterized by rolling hills, agricultural plains, olive groves, and vineyards. You'll encounter varied surfaces, from smoother paths to more challenging ascents and descents, often traversing historical routes.

Q: Are there any mountain bike trails that pass by historical sites or cultural landmarks?
A: Many trails in the region incorporate historical and cultural landmarks. For instance, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e943498719/monasterio-de-vallbona-de-les-monges-y-del-tallat-circular-por-la-ruta-del-cister-gr-175" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Monasterio de Vallbona de les Monges y del Tallat — Circular por la ruta del Cister GR-175&lt;/a&gt; explores Cistercian sites. You can also find routes near the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3309475" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Monastery of Santa María de Vallbona&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5030088" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santuario del Tallat&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any challenging mountain bike routes for experienced riders?
A: Yes, there are 35 difficult mountain bike routes in the area. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/40382771" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Coll de Coloma Pass – Old Bridge of Montblanc loop from Vallbona de les Monges&lt;/a&gt; is a challenging 109 km path with significant elevation changes, suitable for experienced riders.

Q: What are the best times of year for mountain biking in Vallbona De Les Monges?
A: The region generally offers pleasant conditions for mountain biking during spring and autumn, when temperatures are milder. Summer can be quite warm, so early morning or late afternoon rides are advisable, while winter can bring cooler temperatures but often still allows for enjoyable rides.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails that form a loop?
A: Yes, many mountain bike trails in Vallbona De Les Monges are designed as loops. Examples include the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/17550716" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Mountainbike loop from Maldà&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/17550868" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Forest Ascent – Santuario del Tallat loop from el Cap del Coll&lt;/a&gt;, allowing you to start and finish at the same point.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Vallbona De Les Monges?
A: The mountain bike routes in Vallbona De Les Monges are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.9 stars from over 50 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse landscapes, the blend of natural beauty and cultural landmarks, and the well-maintained paths.

Q: Are there any castles or ancient ruins to see while mountain biking?
A: Yes, the region is rich in historical sites. You can find routes that pass near castles such as &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3933785" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Milmanda Castle&lt;/a&gt; or &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/8049582" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guimerà Castle&lt;/a&gt;, offering glimpses into the area's past.

Q: Are there places to stop for refreshments or cafes along the mountain bike routes?
A: While specific cafes directly on every trail are not guaranteed, many routes pass through or near small villages and settlements like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/4696023" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guimerà&lt;/a&gt;, where you can typically find local establishments for refreshments. Planning your route with komoot allows you to identify such points of interest.

Q: What are some notable natural features or monuments I might encounter?
A: Beyond the rolling hills and agricultural landscapes, you might encounter natural features like the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3523125" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Font Baixa&lt;/a&gt;, a man-made monument that blends into the natural surroundings. The region's beauty lies in its expansive views over olive groves and vineyards.

Q: Is there parking available at the trailheads in Vallbona De Les Monges?
A: While specific parking details for every trailhead are not listed, most villages and starting points for popular routes in Vallbona De Les Monges offer public parking options. It's advisable to check the specific route details on komoot for more precise information on parking facilities near your chosen starting point.
tips: The monastery of Santa María de Vallbona is a female Cistercian abbey founded in the 11th century and built in a mixture of Romanesque and Gothic styles. Together with the Poblet and Santes Creus monasteries, it forms the Cistercian Route.

Good views from the top of the hill (628 meters high) where the hermitage is located, just 3km from Ciutadilla.
In 1975 it was built again to face it in the direction of San Cristo de Balaguer.
Church in the town of Rocallaura. It is a transitional church from the Romanesque to the Gothic.
The Tallat sanctuary is located on top of a 788-meter-high hill in the homonymous mountain range. It is Gothic in style and dates from the 13th century. History of the Civil War.
